introSection: Scary Toys Factory was a steel roller coaster at Legendia in Chorzów, Śląskie, Poland. It was previously located at Sommerland Syd under the name of Himalaia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Scary Toys Factory has a Zyklon track layout.

fullText:
Scary Toys Factory was a steel roller coaster at Legendia in Chorzów, Śląskie, Poland. It was previously located at Sommerland Syd under the name of Himalaia.

Scary Toys Factory has a Zyklon track layout.
